chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-1137 0f 2023 Date Order with signature Of JUdge For haaring ol maln caدe 05.122022 Mr Ajeebullah Junejo Advocate for the Petitioner Mr Ghulam Abbas Kuber, AAG along with SHO/SI Muhammad Ashraf of P S Katcho Bindi and IO ASI Bagan Ali District Ghotki Mr Abdul Sattar Thaheem advocatae has filed Vakalatnama behalf of Respondent No.6 which is taken on record Through this petition the petitioner is seeking inquiry into FIR No 10/2023, registered P.5 Katcho Bindi-ll {٥٢ offence punishable under Sections 449 114, 302, 436, 337-4(i), 147, 148 149 PPC, on the ground that her sons have been falsely implicated in this case Investigating Officer is present and submits that in this case interim challan has already been submitted and now the trial is pending before the Court oUr view after registration of FIR there is no scope of inguiry and it is only investigation which is to be conducted and which as per Investigating Officer nas already been completed and the interim challan has been submitted before the Court In the circumstances, the remedy before the trial Court is available to the Petitioner investigation or further investigation in the case Counsel for ٤٨٤ Petitioner accepts this legal position and S٤eKS disposal of petition in the above terms Accordingly this petition is disposed of in the above terms ٩٧٥
